mapper.select: SELECT play_date AS playDate, session_no AS sessionNo, current_question_no AS currentQuestionNo, status, assigned_questions AS assignedQuestions, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM quiz_live_session WHERE play_date = #{playDate} AND session_no = #{sessionNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM quiz_live_session WHERE play_date = #{playDate} AND session_no = #{sessionNo}
mapper.select: SELECT question_id FROM quiz_question ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{limit}
